name: Baichuan 3
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture; vendor describes total parameters as exceeding one trillion

price.provider: Baichuan (platform.baichuan-ai.com, blended CNY rate converted to USD)

note: Trillion-parameter-class closed model claimed to beat GPT-4 on CMMLU/Gaokao/AGIEval and medical exams (MCMLE/MedExam/CMExam); exact parameter count undisclosed.

results.notes: Reported by Baichuan at the Jan 29 2024 Baichuan 3 launch event, relayed by QbitAI (量子位); stated as ~94.55% of GPT-4's contemporaneous MMLU score. No official technical report or model card exists for this closed API-only model, so this Chinese tech-media relay of the vendor's own launch claim is the best available source. Could not find numeric CMMLU/Gaokao/AGIEval/GSM8K/HumanEval/MBPP scores anywhere (multiple EN and CN sources give only qualitative 'surpasses GPT-4' / 'reaches ~90% of GPT-4' comparisons with no digits), so those are left out.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: independent search of Pandaily's article corroborates a Jan 29 2024 release with parameters 'exceeding one trillion', matching the record exactly. No result rows were present to verify. paramsB left null (genuinely undisclosed beyond the '>1T' claim); price/openness left unchanged as no contradicting evidence was found (platform pricing page not independently re-fetched due to search-tool rate limiting).
